summary_line: Self-described 'RIA co-op' — a member-owned platform of independent CFP®-led advisor practices. Co-founded by Leighann Miko CFP® and Katrina Soelter CFP®. $169.4M aggregated AUM across 6 member advisors, 7 employees, 0 DRPs. Revenue-share fee model (15% / 10% / 5% banded). Operations + tech + compliance + outsourced support ($45-$70/hr) provided to member advisors; consumer-facing 'Match With An Advisor' directory on the front-end. Closer to XY Planning Network in shape than to a traditional RIA — but as a cooperative with democratic voting and patronage dividends.
regulatory_note: Avise registered as RIA but functions as a B2B platform / network across member advisors. AUM aggregates across member-firm books. Closer in structure to XY Planning Network than to a standalone advisory firm.

notable_events.event: ADV snapshot via IAPD CRD 328790 — 7 employees, 6 advisors, $169,438,931 regulatory AUM (aggregated across member-firm books), 0 DRPs. Legal name: 'AVISE FINANCIAL.'

Site capture: extract.ts captured homepage only; WebFetch on /team, /for-advisors, /match. Avise positions explicitly as 'an RIA co-op that helps you build your ideal business.' Co-founders: Leighann Miko, CFP® (CSU Northridge → prior independent RIA) and Katrina Soelter, CFP® (UC Berkeley). Two-sided model: (1) advisor-facing — member advisors get compliance + ops + tech suite (AdvicePay, Advyzon, MessageWatcher, Wealthbox) + outsourced financial planning / investment research at $45-$70/hr + democratic voting rights + patronage dividends. Revenue-share tier: 15% of advisor revenue at $0-$500K, 10% at $500K-$1M, 5% at $1M+. (2) consumer-facing — 'Match With An Advisor' questionnaire-to-match flow. Five stated values: Value-Aligned, Independent, Personal, Diverse, Transparent.

_schema._applicability: Avise is registered with the SEC but functions as a B2B network / co-op. Member firms have their own ADV records; Avise's ADV aggregates.
